title: Legacy Medical Device Security Frameworks: Companion Artifacts
description: Open-source companion artifact suite for Mohiuddin, Bernia & Gong (2026), 'A Practical Cybersecurity Framework for Legacy Medical Devices', International Journal of Science and Research Archive, 19(2):1178-1195, doi:10.30574/ijsra.2026.19.2.1164. Five integrated practitioner-oriented frameworks comprising: the Medical Device Risk Score (MDRS) reference calculator with irreversibility-driven tier floor; STRIDE-HC threat-modelling templates for the dual network/physical attack surface; Control Justification Record templates aligned to HIPAA Security Rule, ISO 14971, AAMI TIR57/97, and FDA 524B; a Dockerised empirical test harness; and a software reference design for the inline service-port multi-factor authentication shim (Pattern C).
